channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In Colorado primaries, a democratic socialist wins; Bennet's governor bid ends
item.description: Democrats chose their candidate to challenge a Republican House member and selected the state's attorney general as a leading contender for governor.

item.title: 5 safety tips to keep you out of the emergency room this summer
item.description: Experts offer advice on preventing common summer health risks like drowning, fires, and heat exhaustion.

item.title: Florida takes steps to prevent drowning among children with autism
item.description: Children with autism are 160 times more likely to drown. Florida funds a program focused on swim lessons for them.

item.title: Banksy's London flag man serves as a warning cry
item.description: The figure marches with a flag blowing back in his face, unaware he is about to fall. The artwork carries a cautionary message.
